channel.title: Locked With Preview Fixture
channel.description: Exercises the preview-semantics rule: every locked item carries a non-empty om:preview. A reader at Level 1 MUST display the preview when access is locked.

item.title: Members-only long-form piece
item.description: Available to paid members. The preview below is what non-members see.
item.om:preview: The lead paragraph, visible to all feed consumers so they know what they're subscribing to.
